etymology.description: 衣(衣) (yī, "clothing") + 因(因) (yīn, "cause") = combination describes a cloth spread out -> mat
etymology.interpretation: The character 裀(yīn, "mat") is an ideogrammic compound where 衣(衣) (yī, "clothing") contributes the idea of fabric, and 因(因) (yīn, "cause") represents the function or use of that fabric as a base or layer. Together they suggest a piece of cloth specifically intended for laying down or sitting upon, i.e., a mat.
